subject: WM-0073 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified validateM5ContentPack now derives file and total byte counts from file.text, so spoofed M5ContentPackFile.byteLength cannot bypass manifest maxFileBytes/maxTotalBytes; counters.byteCount reports actual UTF-8 text bytes. Original manifest cap enforcement, deterministic compiler evidence, fail-closed validation tests, allowed scope, and required gates are confirmed.
